---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the digest, ranking, rendering, or delivery flow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature you want.

## Why it matters

Explain how this would improve:

- mobile readability
- robotics relevance
- cloud reliability
- public repo usability

## Alternatives considered

List any other approaches you considered.
